_patch_meta.description: Correction patch for registry 182 — Soul. PATCH-20260324-182-SESSIONB-V1 incorrectly set 16 active terms to delete status. This patch restores the correct mti_status values as documented in the Session B narrative WA-182-soul-analysis-20260325.md Section 1 term inventory. Source of truth: narrative Section 1 table — all 757 verses were read before the narrative was written.
